headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -47.0)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 122% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 105 quotes and 82 at strong intensity - people are venting hard with double the anger from yesterday.
• This frustration level sits in the upper half of the 99-day range, indicating heightened but not extreme discontent.
• Optimism bounced back significantly from yesterday's low, while fears remained quietly subdued.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
